---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

# Jackknife/Bootstrap-Homework

<!-- badges: start -->
<!-- badges: end -->

To navigate through the repository please do the following:

Step 1: Read the Instructions ( Titled the following: Homework_6_Instructions.pdf)

Step 2: Take a look at the written portion of the calculations (Titled: Homework6 Part1.pdf)

Step 3: Take a look at the R portion (Titled: Homework6.pdf)

Step 4: Take a look at the Final document(Titled:Homework6-Final File)
